rules_applied.rule1_description: MedSAM uses detector-guided box prompts with point fallback and mask-constrained ROI segmentation
rules_applied.rule2_description: Only polyps with continuous multi-frame agreement from all 3 models are accepted
rules_applied.rule3_description: Video-level 70-30 split used for symbolic reasoning separation
rules_applied.rule4_description: 444-dimensional SSL features + masked ROI biomarkers integrated into expert decisions
rules_applied.rule5_description: Border and background artifacts are excluded by mask-based ROI cropping
